calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short
cause trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR #13684.

Alison Pascal, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff JOHN STEWART COMPANY.
Witness: Armand Pantaleon sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant KEVYN WELCH.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Settlement Hearing
2-Lease
3-Notice to Quit
4-Civic Center Hotel Incident report forms (7 pages)
5-Civic Center Hotel Incident report forms (5 pages)
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff
and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited. Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 20 12th Street, #421, San Francisco, California 94111.

Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $582.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $315.00
for a Total Judgment of $897.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Jason Jungreis; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Armand Pantaleon.
Attorney Alison Pascal for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kevyn Welch IS NOT PRESENT.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of OCT-11-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
